summary: Tested 2 new features: Supplier Dropdown and Delete Unassigned Devices. Supplier dropdown works correctly showing all suppliers from DB. Single device delete works. CRITICAL BUG: Bulk delete endpoint has route ordering issue causing 404.

critical.issue: Route ordering bug - '/bulk' is matched by '/{manufacturer_sn}' parameter route because it's defined first. Returns 404 with 'Gerät mit SN bulk nicht gefunden'

integration_issues.issue: UI correctly shows bulk delete modal and button, but backend endpoint fails with 404 due to route ordering

issues: React key warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' - not blocking but should be fixed

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix route ordering in asset_management_v2.py - move bulk delete route BEFORE single delete route
After fixing route order, re-test bulk delete functionality
Optional: Fix React key warnings in Assets component
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering bug at lines 3473-3518: @router.delete('/inventory/unassigned/{manufacturer_sn}') must come AFTER @router.delete('/inventory/unassigned/bulk')
FastAPI matches routes in order of definition - more specific paths (/bulk) must be defined before parameterized paths (/{manufacturer_sn})

success_rate.backend: 85% - 11 passed, 2 skipped (bulk delete tests skipped due to route bug)
success_rate.frontend: 90% - All UI elements working, bulk delete action will fail due to backend bug

test_credentials.Navigation: Assets Tab → Wareneingang → Nicht zugewiesen Tab

seed_data_creation: Created test assets with prefix 'TEST-DELETE-*' and 'BULK-TEST-*' during pytest runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier dropdown and single delete work. Bulk delete has backend route ordering bug. After main agent fixes route order in asset_management_v2.py (move line 3518 before line 3473), re-run pytest to verify bulk delete works.

features_tested.Supplier Dropdown - API: PASS - GET /api/asset-mgmt/suppliers returns sorted list of 14+ suppliers
features_tested.Supplier Dropdown - UI: PASS - Dropdown shows all suppliers, values can be selected
features_tested.Single Device Delete - UI: PASS - Trash icon click opens confirmation modal, confirm deletes device
features_tested.Bulk Delete - UI: PASS - UI correctly shows selection count and bulk delete button/modal
features_tested.Unassigned List - API: PASS - GET /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/unassigned returns paginated list with type summary

rca_of_issue.root_cause: FastAPI route definition order - parameterized route /{manufacturer_sn} at line 3473 catches /bulk before it can reach the actual /bulk handler at line 3518
reproduction_steps: 2. Observe 404 error: 'Gerät mit SN bulk nicht gefunden'
rca_of_issue.fix: In /app/backend/routes/asset_management_v2.py, move lines 3518-3546 (bulk delete endpoint) to BEFORE lines 3473-3515 (single delete endpoint)
